title: Noori Chamb
tagline: Noori Chamb — heritage city of Jammu & Kashmir

overview.short: Noori Chamb is a waterfall in the headwaters of the Poonch River in Poonch district of Jammu and Kashmir in India.
overview.description: Noori Chamb is a waterfall in the headwaters of the Poonch River in Poonch district of Jammu and Kashmir in India. It is named after the Mughal queen Nur Jahan. Noori Chamb is located near the hill village of Bahramgala below Pir Panjal Pass (Peer Ki Gali) in the Poonch district. It is at a distance of 10 km from Bufliaz.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chandimarh
topPlaces.description: Chandimarh or Chandi Marh is a village in Poonch district, Jammu and Kashmir, India, situated between Noori Chamb and Bufliaz Block. It is 26 km east of the district headquarters Poonch, and 22 km from sub-district headquarter Surankote.

topPlaces.name: Bufliaz
topPlaces.description: Bufliaz, or Bafliaz, is a village and the headquarters of the eponymous community development block in Surankote tehsil of Poonch district in the Jammu division of Jammu and Kashmir, India. It lies on the Poonch–Rajouri road and is also the starting point of the Mughal Road that leads into the Kashmir Valley through Shopian.

topPlaces.name: Azmatabad, Jammu and Kashmir
topPlaces.description: Azmatabad is a village, near Rajouri City in Thanamandi tehsil in Rajouri district of the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir.

topPlaces.name: Thanamandi
topPlaces.description: Thanamandi is a town and a municipal committee in the Rajouri district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. Thanamandi lies on the Mughal Road between Rajouri and Bufliaz.

topPlaces.name: Bhata Dhurian
topPlaces.description: Bhata Dhurian is a village in Poonch district, Jammu and Kashmir, India.

items.note: Chandimarh or Chandi Marh is a village in Poonch district, Jammu and Kashmir, India, situated between Noori Chamb and Bufliaz Block. It is 26 km east of the district headquarters Poonch, and 22 km from sub-district headquarter Surankote.

Bufliaz, or Bafliaz, is a village and the headquarters of the eponymous community development block in Surankote tehsil of Poonch district in the Jammu division of Jammu and Kashmir, India. It lies on the Poonch–Rajouri road and is also the starting point of the Mughal Road that leads into the Kashmir Valley through Shopian.
Azmatabad is a village, near Rajouri City in Thanamandi tehsil in Rajouri district of the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir.
Thanamandi is a town and a municipal committee in the Rajouri district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. Thanamandi lies on the Mughal Road between Rajouri and Bufliaz.
Bhata Dhurian is a village in Poonch district, Jammu and Kashmir, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Noori Chamb?
faq.a: The best time to visit Noori Chamb is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Noori Chamb?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sheikh ul-Alam International Airport, Srinagar (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Noori Chamb?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Noori Chamb at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Noori Chamb?
faq.a: Stays in Noori Chamb start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Noori Chamb?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandimarh, Bufliaz, Azmatabad, Jammu and Kashmir, Thanamandi, Bhata Dhurian.
